case_title: MANUEL CARRILLO ET AL VS. BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR APPROVAL OF COMPLEX LITIGATION DESIGNATION (TRANSACTION ID # 64279094) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY
NOTICE NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE (TRANSACTION ID # 100085995) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRILLO, MANUEL HERNANDEZ, MARISA

COMPLEX LITIGATION - INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. HEARING HELD. THE COURT SETS A MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS (DENNIS, CGC-19-574516) FOR JAN-31-2020 AT 2:30 PM. THE NEXT CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR FEB-13-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 304. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT, CSR 4609 (T: 415.272.1753, E: TAMARAWILLAT@SBCGLOBAL.NET)
